steps.t: Sovairlë is your trainer in the Ettenmoors. Speak with them and learn about skills in the Ettenmoors.
You successfully enabled the skill <rgb=#FFFF00>March!</rgb>. Speak with Sovairlë again to learn more.
You have learned to strengthen yourself and to move swiftly. Sovairlë directed you to a vendor near the gate. Curious. Seek out the vendor Nadar and s…
